task_completion.description: Create a new role named 'External Reviewer'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Roles and permissions' administration page with 'External Reviewer' listed, or the role creation form with 'External Reviewer' entered in the Name field.

task_completion.description: Set the correct visibility settings for Issues, Time logs, and Users
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the role configuration screen showing 'Issues visibility' set to 'Issues created by or assigned to the user', 'Time logs visibility' set to 'None', and 'Users visibility' set to 'Members of visible projects'.

task_completion.description: Set the exact permissions required for the role
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the role permissions checklist showing ONLY 'View issues', 'Add issues', 'Add notes', and 'View files' checked. Other permissions (like edit/delete issues, wiki, or repository access) must be visibly unchecked.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Mobile Banking App' project members settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Settings' -> 'Members' tab within the 'Mobile Banking App' project.

task_completion.description: Assign Jordan Lee to the project with the 'External Reviewer' role
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the project Members list showing the user 'Jordan Lee' (or 'jordan.lee') with the assigned role 'External Reviewer'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Redmine web GUI to configure the role and assign the user
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Redmine interface, not terminal commands (like curl or rails console) being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely navigated through the application
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate screens such as the Administration panel, Roles list, or Project settings tabs, rather than just a final edited state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the expected outcome into a text file or HTML mock
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the actual live Redmine application with standard layout, styling, and interactive elements visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target role name is 'External Reviewer'. Target user login is 'jordan.lee'. Target project identifier is 'mobile-banking'. The required issues visibility setting corresponds to 'Issues created by or assigned to the user' (internally 'own'). The role must strictly have only 'View issues', 'Add issues', 'Add notes' (internally 'add_issue_notes'), and 'View files' permissions checked; all other permissions (e.g., edit_issues, delete_issues, view_wiki_pages, browse_repository) must be unchecked.
